name: hivemind-marketplace
description: Cloud-backed knowledge graph for Claude Code sessions with shared global graph

metadata.description: Marketplace for the Hivemind plugin — a cloud-backed knowledge graph that captures problem-solving patterns and syncs them to a shared global graph via MCP.

plugins.name: hivemind
plugins.description: Cloud-backed knowledge graph for Claude Code. Captures problem-solving patterns, debugging strategies, and tool usage from session transcripts. Syncs anonymized knowledge to a shared global graph. Query memories via MCP tools.
